mail.subject: Payables_Finance_Program_Invitation
mail.body:
Dear ${name},

China Systems, in partnership with CS Bank, has invited you to join their Payables Finance Program.

Please click the following secure registration link to get started:

${link}

IMPORTANT: This link is time-bound and can only be used once for security purposes.
If the link has expired or you need a new link, please contact your anchor customer.

Best regards,
SCF Integration Team
CS Bank Support
